interpretation_limits: Reliability is agreement with intentionally masked attested dev text, not truth for a genuine lacuna.
Same-CTH membership is catalog-assisted candidate selection.
Parallel witnesses may preserve variants or omissions; a nonmatching middle is not automatically an error.
Calibration targets are exploratory and remain unpromoted.
